name: punch-character-motion
description: Verify punch input drives a visible full-body pose on modern AnimationConstraint rigs and legacy Motor6D rigs, recovers cleanly, and honors Motion Feedback off.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,CritChance=0,SettingsJSON=game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode({motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1})}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-2,7,-13) return true

steps.label: prepare a valid Brick Wall punch

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local R=game:GetService("RunService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local joint for _,d in ipairs(p.Character:GetDescendants()) do if (d:IsA("Motor6D") or d:IsA("AnimationConstraint")) and (d.Name=="RightShoulder" or d.Name=="Right Shoulder") then joint=d break end end assert(joint,"right shoulder joint missing") local before=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0 g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("Punch") local maxAngle,maxPosition=0,0 for _=1,32 do R.RenderStepped:Wait() local x,y,z=joint.Transform:ToOrientation() maxAngle=math.max(maxAngle,math.abs(x),math.abs(y),math.abs(z)) maxPosition=math.max(maxPosition,joint.Transform.Position.Magnitude) end task.wait(.2) return H:JSONEncode({class=joint.ClassName,rig=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchRig"),count=(g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0)-before,peak=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionPeak") or 0,maxAngle=maxAngle,maxPosition=maxPosition,active=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionActive")})

steps.label: punch produces and recovers a visible character pose

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local before=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0 g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("Punch") task.wait(.25) local result=H:JSONEncode({count=(g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0)-before,suppressed=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionSuppressed"),active=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionActive")}) game.ReplicatedStorage.PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest:FireServer({action="UpdateSettings",value={motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1}}) return result
